title: PhaseModel
description: Reusable lifecycle phase model for AppProfile. Declares the ordered sequence of phases an application profile traverses from declaration to operational readiness. Eight canonical phases are defined: ScopeEstablishment, IdentityRegistration, AuthorityResolution, StructuralWiring, EventContractRegistration, WorkflowBootstrap, BehavioralConfiguration, ProfileCompletion.

phases.description: Ordered list of PhaseDefinition objects that form the lifecycle model.

PhaseDefinition.description: Defines a single lifecycle phase within a PhaseModel.

name.description: Phase name. For AppProfile, must be one of the eight canonical phase names: ScopeEstablishment, IdentityRegistration, AuthorityResolution, StructuralWiring, EventContractRegistration, WorkflowBootstrap, BehavioralConfiguration, ProfileCompletion.

order.description: Numeric ordering of this phase within the model. Lower values execute first. Must be unique within a PhaseModel.

parallel.description: When true, this phase may execute concurrently with other phases that share the same order value.

entryConditions.description: Conditions that must be satisfied before this phase may begin. Each entry is a condition type string evaluated against the AppProfile status conditions.

exitConditions.description: Conditions that must be satisfied for this phase to be considered complete. Each entry is a condition type string.

dependsOn.description: Names of other phases that must reach terminal state before this phase may begin.
